metric_definitions.coverage_grid: Main coverage metric. Fixed multi-plane grid coverage using 1 top-view plane (normal Z) + N vertical planes (normals sampled in XY). For each plane: project BIM & as-built to plane coordinates, rasterize with grid_cell_size. Let b = number of occupied BIM grid cells, g = number of BIM grid cells also occupied by as-built. coverage_grid = sum(g) / sum(b) across planes.
metric_definitions.grid_total_b: Sum of b (occupied BIM grid cells) across all planes used in coverage_grid.
metric_definitions.grid_total_g: Sum of g (overlapped grid cells) across all planes used in coverage_grid.

grid_per_plane.mode: Plane generation mode. In this version it is fixed: 'fixed_top_plus_vertical' = 1 top-view plane + N vertical planes.
grid_per_plane.normal: Observation plane normal vector [nx, ny, nz].
grid_per_plane.b: Occupied BIM grid cell count on this plane.
grid_per_plane.g: Overlapped grid cell count on this plane (cells occupied by both BIM and as-built).

metric_definitions.coverage_hit: Auxiliary point-wise hit ratio. For each BIM point in cloud_down, search neighbors in asbuilt_seg_down within radius hit_distance. coverage_hit = hit_count / num_BIM_points.

voxel_stats.voxel_size: Voxel size used for occupancy statistics (voxel_occ_size).
voxel_stats.voxel_bim: Number of occupied voxels in BIM (Vb).
voxel_stats.voxel_asbuilt: Number of occupied voxels in as-built segment (Va).
voxel_stats.voxel_intersect: Number of voxels occupied by both (|Vb ∩ Va|).
voxel_stats.voxel_union: Number of voxels occupied by either (|Vb ∪ Va|).
voxel_stats.voxel_recall: Recall on occupancy: |Vb ∩ Va| / |Vb| (how much BIM occupancy is covered by as-built).
voxel_stats.voxel_precision: Precision on occupancy: |Vb ∩ Va| / |Va| (how much as-built occupancy belongs to BIM).
voxel_stats.voxel_down_size: Downsample voxel size used to build cloud_down/asbuilt_seg_down (voxel_down_size).
voxel_stats.voxel_occ_size: Occupancy voxel size used for voxel_stats (voxel_occ_size).

metric_definitions.mean_nn_cloud_to_asbuilt: Mean nearest-neighbor distance from BIM downsampled points (cloud_down) to as-built downsampled segment points (asbuilt_seg_down), computed using Open3D compute_point_cloud_distance.
metric_definitions.shape_linearity: PCA shape descriptor: (λ1 - λ2) / λ1. High means line-like.
metric_definitions.shape_planarity: PCA shape descriptor: (λ2 - λ3) / λ1. High means plane-like.
metric_definitions.shape_scattering: PCA shape descriptor: λ3 / λ1. High means volumetric/scattered (more irregular).
metric_definitions.shape_class: Object type classification based on shape_scattering threshold (for explanation only): 'regular' if scattering < irregular_scattering_threshold else 'irregular'.
metric_definitions.coverage_strategy: Which observation-plane strategy was used for coverage_grid. In this version: fixed_top_plus_vertical (1 top-view + N vertical planes) for all objects.

summary_line: Type=IfcBuildingElementProxy; shape_class=regular (classified by PCA scattering: irregular if scattering >= threshold, otherwise regular; classification does NOT change coverage planes). coverage_grid=0.745 (coverage computed using fixed observation planes: 1 top-view (normal Z) + 5 vertical planes parallel to Z-axis (normals sampled in XY directions), measuring BIM grid cells overlapped by as-built). coverage_hit=0.745 (fraction of BIM points with any as-built neighbor within hit_distance). voxel_precision=0.455 (fraction of as-built occupied voxels that also belong to BIM, indicating segmentation purity). voxel_recall=0.833 (fraction of BIM occupied voxels covered by as-built, indicating spatial completeness). voxel_iou=0.417 (voxel-level overlap quality: intersection over union of BIM vs as-built occupancy).
